html:
Exclusive to:

Dumbbells are items which can only crafted by Wolfgang and can only be held by him. They can be used as weapons or can be lifted to fill up Wolfgang's Mightiness Meter each time he lifts them, depending on his current strength and the Dumbbell he uses. Wolfgang does 1 lift per second. Attacking using a Dumbbell will have the effects as lifting it 0.5 times, and Mighty Wolfgang can throw the Dumbbells, causing damage to targets in a small radius. Throwing damage equals to 2x melee attack damage. Melee attacking costs 2 uses of the Dumbbell, and throwing cost 10 uses.

When Wolfgang moves while holding Dumbbells on hand, his mightiness will not decrease.

Contents

  • 1 Dumbbell
  • 2 Golden Dumbbell
  • 3 Marbell
  • 4 Gembell
  • 5 Firebell
  • 6 Icebell
  • 7 Thermbell
  • 8 Tips
  • 9 Trivia
  • 10 Gallery

Dumbbell

“When equipped Wolfgang can Lift to raise his Mightiness.”

-

The Dumbbell is the most basic of the Dumbbells, and is the one Wolfgang starts with. It increases 3 Mightiness points when Wimpy and normal, and 1.5 when Mighty.

Golden Dumbbell

“When equipped Wolfgang can Lift to raise his Mightiness.”

-

The Golden Dumbbell is the upgraded version of the Dumbbell. It increases 5 Mightiness points per lift when Wimpy, 3 when normal, and 1.5 when Mighty.

Marbell

“When equipped Wolfgang can Lift to raise his Mightiness.”

-

The Marbell is the upgraded version of the Golden Dumbbell, and was added in the March 2022 QoL update. It increases 5 Mightiness points when Wimpy and normal, and 3 when Mighty, at a cost of reducing movement speed by 10% while equipped when not Mighty.

Gembell

“When equipped Wolfgang can Lift to raise his Mightiness.”

-

The Gembell is the upgraded version of the Marbell. It always increases 5 Mightiness points regardless of Wolfgang's current form.

Firebell

“When equipped Wolfgang can Lift to raise his Mightiness.

When thrown it creates fire where it lands.”

-

The Firebell can only be crafted by Wolfgang with Dumbbell Developer skill unlocked. When thrown, it lights everything around where it lands on fire, including structures and mobs. It always increases 5 Mightiness points regardless of Wolfgang's current form.

Icebell

“When equipped Wolfgang can Lift to raise his Mightiness.

When thrown it increases the coldness of creatures near where it lands.”

-

The Icebell can only be crafted by Wolfgang with Dumbbell Developer skill unlocked. When thrown, it freezes surrounding Mobs for the equivalent of two Ice Staff blasts. It always increases 5 Mightiness points regardless of Wolfgang's current form.

Thermbell

“When equipped Wolfgang can Lift to raise his Mightiness.

Gains heat when near something hot, and cools near something cold.

It will warm or cool the holder depending on its temperature.”

-

The Thermbell' can only be crafted by Wolfgang with Dumbbell Developer skill unlocked. It absorbs heat and cold. If not used to lift, it is completely identical to a Thermal Stone. It increases 3 Mightiness points when Wimpy and normal, and 1.5 when Mighty.

Tips

  • As the Dumbbell is very inefficient, it could be used to keep Wolfgang's Mightiness from dropping until a better source of Mightiness is acquired.
  • Due to the Golden Dumbbell's overall cheapness and good efficiency, it can easily replace the Dumbbell in the early-game.
  • The Marbell increases mightiness at quite a quick rate. If you can find marble it's a viable alternative to the Mighty Gym that doesn't require gems. Full 100 mightiness can be reached in around 30 seconds starting at 0.

Trivia

  • The Dumbbell's crafting description "Sticks and stones make muscles honed." is a reference to the children's rhyme "Sticks and Stones". The rhyme is used as a defense against name-calling and verbal bullying, intended to increase resiliency, avoid physical retaliation and to remain calm and good-living. The full rhyme is usually a variant of: "Sticks and stones may break my bones, but words shall never hurt me."
  • Despite being heavy weights, they don't sink when dropped on water.
    • However, it makes sense for the Gembell as Gems don't sink in water.
  • Dumbbells were heavily changed in the March 2022 QoL update:
    • The Marbell was introduced.
    • The Cut Stone requirement was removed, and the amount of Twigs was reduced from two to only one.
  • The Thermbell, Icebell and Firebell were introduced in the Skill Spotlight: Wormwood, Wolfgang, Woodie update.

Gallery

  • Wolfgang lifting a Dumbbell while Wimpy.
  • Wolfgang lifting a Dumbbell while Normal.
  • Wolfgang lifting a Dumbbell while Mighty.
  • Mighty Wolfgang using a Gembell to kill spiders.
  • Dumbbell Equipped
  • Golden Dumbbell Equipped
  • Marbell Equipped
  • Gembell Equipped
  • Firebell Equipped
  • Icebell Equipped
  • Thermbell Equipped
  • Thermbell Equipped Stage 5
  • Thermbell Equipped Stage 4
  • Thermbell Equipped Stage 1
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

Exclusive to:
Dumbbells are items which can only crafted by Wolfgang and can only be held by him. They can be used as weapons or can be lifted to fill up Wolfgang's Mightiness Meter each time he lifts them, depending on his current strength and the Dumbbell he uses. Wolfgang does 1 lift per second. Attacking using a Dumbbell will have the effects as lifting it 0.5 times, and Mighty Wolfgang can throw the Dumbbells, causing damage to targets in a small radius. “I usually let my mind do all the heavy lifting.”

–Maxwell

“I can do it! I just... need to get a good grip on it!”

“What a dreadfully repetitive way to spend one's time.”

“When equipped Wolfgang can Lift to raise his Mightiness.”

The Dumbbell's crafting description "Sticks and stones make muscles honed." is a reference to the children's rhyme "Sticks and Stones". The rhyme is used as a defense against name-calling and verbal bullying, intended to increase resiliency, avoid physical retaliation and to remain calm and good-living. The full rhyme is usually a variant of: "Sticks and stones may break my bones, but words shall never hurt me."
Despite being heavy weights, they don't sink when dropped on water.
However, it makes sense for the Gembell as Gems don't sink in water.

The Marbell was introduced.
The Cut Stone requirement was removed, and the amount of Twigs was reduced from two to only one.
The Thermbell, Icebell and Firebell were introduced in the Skill Spotlight: Wormwood, Wolfgang, Woodie update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Quả tạ là vật phẩm chỉ có Wolfgang mới có thể chế tạo và chỉ có anh ta mới có thể cầm được. Chúng có thể được sử dụng làm vũ khí hoặc có thể được nâng lên để làm đầy Đồng hồ đo sức mạnh của Wolfgang mỗi khi anh ta nhấc chúng lên, tùy thuộc vào sức mạnh hiện tại của anh ta và Quả tạ mà anh ta sử dụng. Wolfgang thực hiện 1 lần nâng mỗi giây. Tấn công bằng Quả tạ sẽ có tác dụng nâng nó lên 0,5 lần và Mighty Wolfgang có thể ném Quả tạ, gây sát thương cho mục tiêu trong bán kính nhỏ. Sát thương ném bằng 2 lần sát thương tấn công cận chiến. Tấn công cận chiến tốn 2 lần sử dụng Quả tạ và ném mất 10 lần sử dụng.
title: Dumbbells

When thrown it creates fire where it lands.}} The '''Firebell''' can only be crafted by Wolfgang with [[Dumbbell Developer]] skill unlocked. When thrown, it lights everything around where it lands on fire, including structures and mobs. It always increases 5 Mightiness points regardless of Wolfgang's current form. {{Clear}} == Icebell== {{Object Infobox |equipslot=hands |spawnCode="dumbbell_bluegem" |name = Icebell |image = Icebell Dropped.png |icon = Icebell.png |description = Ice out would-be workout disturbers. |ingredient1 = thulecite |multiplier1 = 2 |ingredient2 = Blue Gem |multiplier2 = 1 |ingredient3 = twigs |multiplier3 = 1 ({{pic24|Wolfgang Portrait}} only) |durability = 334 uses |filter = {{Pic32|Wolfgang Filter}} |stack = Does not stack |damage = 42.5 |skill = Dumbbell Developer |skillOwner = Wolfgang}} {{Quotes |wilson = You can't get much cooler than that. |willow = Ugh! IT WILL BE HUMOROUS |wickerbottom = My, it's ice-cold to the touch! |woodie = You just throw it at whoever ya don't like, eh? Sounds pretty cold. |maxwell = It has all the grace and subtlety I'd expect from the strong man. |wigfrid = My ally wields a strange weapön, indeed. |webber = Oh! Good one, Walter. |wanda = Not the most conventional weapon, but to each their own. |choose = woodie}} {{Scrapbook Info|When equipped Wolfgang can Lift to raise his Mightiness.

When thrown it increases the coldness of creatures near where it lands.}} The '''Icebell''' can only be crafted by Wolfgang with [[Dumbbell Developer]] skill unlocked. When thrown, it freezes surrounding Mobs for the equivalent of two [[Ice Staff]] blasts. It always increases 5 Mightiness points regardless of Wolfgang's current form. {{Clear}} == Thermbell == {{Object Infobox |name = Thermbell |equipslot=hands |icon = Thermbell.png|Normal Thermbell Stage 1.png|Stage 1 Thermbell Stage 2.png|Stage 2 Thermbell Stage 4.png|Stage 4 Thermbell Stage 5.png|Stage 5 |image = Thermbell Dropped.png|Normal Thermbell Dropped Stage 1.png|Stage 1 Thermbell Dropped Stage 4.png|Stage 4 Thermbell Dropped Stage 5.png|Stage 5 |description = Get the ultimate warm-up. |ingredient1 = rocks |multiplier1 = 12 |ingredient2 = Pickaxe/DST |multiplier2 = 1 |ingredient3 = flint |multiplier3 = 4 ({{pic24|Wolfgang Portrait}} only) |perk = |durability = 150 uses |filter = {{Pic32|Wolfgang Filter}} |tier = |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "dumbbell_heat" |damage = 17 |skill = Dumbbell Developer |skillOwner = Wolfgang }} {{Quotes |wilson = It's good for a warm-up. |willow = Let's get you all fired up for your workout, big guy! |wolfgang = Wolfgang is getting good warm-up! |wendy = It may warm the body, but not the heart. |wx78 = A DUAL-PURPOSE MINION ENHANCER |wickerbottom = An interesting combination of exercise and temperature regulation. |woodie = I think he took "warm-up" a bit too literally, eh? |maxwell = You won't catch me lugging it around. |wigfrid = Training in comfort |webber = Mr. Wolfgang says it's for warming up. |winona = Is that what he uses for a warm-up? |warly = Ah, so this is for "warming up," non? |wortox = A warm stone for muscle tone. |wormwood = Heavy hot cold rocks |wurt = Muscly mustache man leave rocks everywhere. |walter = I can warm up without lifting anything! N-not that I can't! |wanda = Well, at least it's efficient. |choose = warly}} {{Scrapbook Info|When equipped Wolfgang can Lift to raise his Mightiness.

Gains heat when near something hot, and cools near something cold.

It will warm or cool the holder depending on its temperature.}} The '''Thermbell'''' can only be crafted by Wolfgang with [[Dumbbell Developer]] skill unlocked. It absorbs heat and cold. If not used to lift, it is completely identical to a [[Thermal Stone/DST|Thermal Stone]]. It increases 3 Mightiness points when Wimpy and normal, and 1.5 when Mighty. {{Clear}} =={{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips== *As the Dumbbell is very inefficient, it could be used to keep Wolfgang's Mightiness from dropping until a better source of Mightiness is acquired. *Due to the Golden Dumbbell's overall cheapness and good efficiency, it can easily replace the Dumbbell in the early-game. *The Marbell increases mightiness at quite a quick rate. If you can find marble it's a viable alternative to the Mighty Gym that doesn't require gems. Full 100 mightiness can be reached in around 30 seconds starting at 0. =={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia== *The Dumbbell's crafting description "Sticks and stones make muscles honed." is a reference to the children's rhyme "[[Wikipedia:Sticks and Stones|Sticks and Stones]]". The rhyme is used as a defense against name-calling and verbal bullying, intended to increase resiliency, avoid physical retaliation and to remain calm and good-living. The full rhyme is usually a variant of: "Sticks and stones may break my bones, but words shall never hurt me." *Despite being heavy weights, they don't sink when dropped on water. **However, it makes sense for the Gembell as [[Gems]] don't sink in water. *Dumbbells were heavily changed in the [[Don't Starve Together/Version History#March 24, 2022 - March 2022 QoL Update|March 2022 QoL update]]: **The Marbell was introduced. **The Cut Stone requirement was removed, and the amount of Twigs was reduced from two to only one. * The Thermbell, Icebell and Firebell were introduced in the ''[[Skill Spotlight Update#Wormwood, Wolfgang, Woodie|Skill Spotlight: Wormwood, Wolfgang, Woodie]]'' update. =={{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery== Wolfgang Lifting Wimpy.png|Wolfgang lifting a Dumbbell while Wimpy.
